description: ASP.NET Core is a cross-platform .NET framework for building modern cloud-based web applications on Windows, Mac, or Linux.
commit_message:
Add InitialIndex parameter and ScrollToIndexAsync API to `Virtualize<TItem>` (#66753)

* Introduce a programmatic API to scroll a Virtualize<TItem> component to an arbitrary item index, plus a parameter for opening the list at a target index on first render.

* Use the pattern from NavigationManager or MAUI's CollectionView.ScrollTo().

* Cancel in-flight refresh on user scroll during ScrollToIndexAsync and add E2E coverage.

* Fix AnchorMode interfering with InitialIndex/ScrollToIndex scrolling
